title: Ultra-Luster Flame Baroque
teaser: Large Fireball Baroque Pearl, AAA Metallic Luster with Rose Overtones.
inspiration: The dramatic flame-like contour and breathtaking metallic sheen make this specimen ideal as a centerpiece for a sculptural, textured gold statement pendant or an avant-garde drop earring.

title: Ultra-Luster Flame Baroque
teaser: Large Fireball Baroque Pearl, AAA Luster, Milky White with Rainbow Iridescence.
inspiration:
Like divine treasures left by the gods, this perfectly paired set of milky-white fireball baroque pearls features vibrant rainbow overtones. 

 Their organic, baby-palm silhouette offers unparalleled uniqueness, ideal for bespoke earrings or symmetrical necklace centerpieces.

title: Ultra-Luster Flame Baroque
teaser: Large Fireball Baroque Pearl, AAA Luster, Milky White with Rainbow Iridescence.
inspiration:
Symbolizing purity and beauty, this matched pair of milky-white fireball baroque pearls features striking 3D flame contours and rich rainbow overtones. 

 Resembling divine treasures, their sculptural silhouettes make them an extraordinary centerpiece, ideal for bespoke earrings or standalone pendants.

title: Mirror-Luster Nugget Baroque
teaser: Silver-White Nugget Baroque, AAA Surface with Subtle Rainbow Overtones.
inspiration: Featuring a harmonious scale with distinct organic shapes, these silvery-white nugget baroque pearls radiate a star-like brilliance. Exceptionally versatile, they excel as bold standalone pieces or as sophisticated accent strands designed to elevate a magnificent centerpiece.

title: Ultra-Luster Stick Baroque
inspiration: Featuring smooth, uniform contours, these silvery-white stick pearls serve as sophisticated accent strands. Designed to enhance the overall refinement of a necklace, they add a soft, layered dimension while allowing the main centerpiece to remain the true star.
